dataset: FluorescentCells.tif — ImageJ/NIH standard sample image, from Molecular Probes FluoCells Slide #2 (Thermo Fisher F14781)

pi_items.source: Live environment test: file exists at /home/ga/Fiji_Data/raw/confocal/FluorescentCells.tif, downloaded from https://imagej.nih.gov/ij/images/FluorescentCells.zip (must use .zip, direct .tif URL 404s). File size: 790606 bytes. TIFF image, big-endian.

The pixel size is NOT embedded in the image metadata. Fiji opens it with uncalibrated pixels (1.0 px/px). The 0.32 um/px value is an assumed confocal pixel size assigned by the task creator — it is not verifiable from the image itself. The task instructs the agent to set this value manually via Analyze > Set Scale.
Fiji headless macro confirmed: Channels=3, Slices=1, Frames=1. PIL analysis also confirmed 3 frames. Split Channels produces C1-FluorescentCells.tif, C2-FluorescentCells.tif, C3-FluorescentCells.tif.
Fiji headless: Width=512, Height=512. PIL: Size=(512, 512). file command: height=512, width=512.

Confirmed via Thermo Fisher FluoCells Slide #2 (F14781) product page and Nikon MicroscopyU. Blue channel = DAPI nuclear stain. Image statistics: C3 (Blue) after split has mean=2.3, 40.4% non-zero pixels — consistent with nuclear staining (compact bright spots on dark background). The sample is bovine pulmonary artery endothelial (BPAE) cells.

pi_items.verified_value: microtubules (Bodipy FL goat anti-mouse IgG, targeting alpha-tubulin)
pi_items.source: Confirmed via Thermo Fisher FluoCells Slide #2 product listing: 'Mouse Anti-alpha-tubulin, Alexa Fluor 488 conjugate / BODIPY FL goat anti-mouse IgG'. Image statistics: C2 (Green) after split has mean=15.3, 100.0% non-zero — consistent with tubulin/microtubule network filling entire cell bodies. NOTE: Original metadata incorrectly said 'phalloidin' — phalloidin stains F-actin and is in the RED channel, not green.

Confirmed via Thermo Fisher FluoCells Slide #2 product listing: 'Texas Red-X Phalloidin' for F-actin staining. Image statistics: C1 (Red) after split has mean=13.9, 71.4% non-zero — consistent with actin stress fibers and cortical actin. NOTE: Original metadata incorrectly said 'MitoTracker/mitochondria'. A separate Molecular Probes demo slide DOES use MitoTracker Red CMXRos, but that is FluoCells Slide #1 (F36924), NOT Slide #2 which is the source of FluorescentCells.tif.
Live test: setup_task.sh creates /home/ga/Fiji_Data/results/cell_pipeline/ with correct permissions (owner ga:ga). Directory verified empty after setup.
Path defined by task. export_result.sh checks this exact path. Live test with dummy data confirmed export_result.sh correctly reads and parses this file.
Path defined by task. export_result.sh checks this exact path.
Path defined by task. export_result.sh checks this exact path. Live test confirmed keyword detection works.

Cannot verify exact nuclear count without running the full GUI pipeline (headless Analyze Particles fails due to dialog limitations). Range 5-500 is intentionally broad. From image statistics: Blue channel has 40.4% non-zero pixels (105946/262144), consistent with 20-200 nuclei depending on threshold settings.
See expected_nuclear_count_min note. 500 is an upper bound that accommodates variation in threshold settings.

Cannot verify without running GUI-based Analyze Skeleton (plugin throws 'Cannot instantiate headless dialog' in headless mode). 10 is a conservative minimum. The AnalyzeSkeleton_-3.4.2.jar plugin IS installed at /opt/fiji/Fiji/plugins/.
Cannot verify exact count without GUI pipeline. Red/F-actin channel has 71.4% non-zero pixels with mean=13.9. Thresholded actin structures would produce features countable by Analyze Particles.
See expected_actin_feature_count_min. Upper bound is generous to accommodate varying threshold choices.

privileged_info_summary: FluorescentCells.tif is from Molecular Probes FluoCells Slide #2 (Thermo Fisher F14781), containing bovine pulmonary artery endothelial (BPAE) cells with three fluorescent stains. The image is 512x512 pixels, 8-bit, 3 channels (no Z-slices). File size is 790606 bytes. All intensity values range 0-76 (not 0-255). After Fiji's 'Split Channels', C1=Red (F-actin, Texas Red X-Phalloidin, mean=13.9, 71.4% non-zero), C2=Green (microtubules, Bodipy FL anti-tubulin, mean=15.3, 100% non-zero), C3=Blue (nuclei, DAPI, mean=2.3, 40.4% non-zero). The pixel size is NOT embedded in the image — the agent must set it manually to 0.32 um/px via Analyze > Set Scale. The Skeletonize3D (v2.1.1) and AnalyzeSkeleton (v3.4.2) plugins are installed in /opt/fiji/Fiji/plugins/. Image Calculator, Merge Channels, and Skeletonize operations were verified working in the live environment. Analyze Particles and Analyze Skeleton require GUI mode (fail in headless). The task requires 3 output files: channel_measurements.csv (Channel/Metric_Name/Value, min 6 rows), analysis_figure.png (2x3 montage), and analysis_report.txt with all metrics and units. The agent should save all outputs to ~/Fiji_Data/results/cell_pipeline/.
